CustomField.description: Calculated by Customizable Rollups. Do not edit manually. The Membership Origin (new, renewal, reacquire) of the most recent (by Close Date) won Membership Opportunity where this Contact has the primary Opportunity Contact Role. Uses the Closed Won Memberships filter group.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The origin (new, renewal, reacquire) of the most recent won Membership Opportunity where this Contact is the primary donor.
CustomField.label: Last Membership Origin
